prompt: Which companies are showing up most frequently across our webinar programs this quarter?
What percentage of our webinar audience comes from our target ICP accounts?
Are we attracting new companies or the same ones across our events? Show me overlap trends.
Which of our events pulled in the most enterprise-tier companies by attendee count?
Show me a breakdown of audience sources — how are people finding and registering for our webinars?
Which registration source drives the highest attendance rate across our programs?
How has the mix of audience sources shifted over the past six months?
Are the same companies attending multiple events in the same program series, or do we see fresh audiences each time?
Which event had the most diverse company representation in its audience?
What share of our total registrations this year came from organic versus paid sources?
Which of our webinars generated the most high-intent engagement signals this quarter?
Which events are consistently driving the most qualified leads into our funnel?
Show me the top 10 events ranked by attendee engagement score — these are our best pipeline contributors.
How does our overall program engagement score trend across the year? Are we improving funnel quality?
Which webinar topics correlate with the highest average engagement rates?
What is the total number of high-engagement attendees we produced across all programs this year?
Which single event drove the most account-level engagement this quarter?
Show me a bar chart of our top 10 events ranked by total attendee count as a proxy for pipeline reach.
Are there specific event formats — live versus simulive — that show meaningfully better engagement rates?
Which companies attended three or more of our events and showed high engagement — these are our best pipeline accounts.
Which event types have performed best when aligned with a product launch — what format should we default to?
What topics drove the highest registration numbers in Q1 — I want to align our next launch campaign around proven themes.
Show me which of our recent webinars had the highest on-demand view rate — those are the evergreen topics we should build campaigns around.
Which of our content themes have shown consistent audience growth over multiple events? I want to double down for our next campaign.
What has been our average registration lift when we run a webinar as part of an integrated campaign versus standalone?
Which speakers have driven the highest registrations for product-focused webinars?
How far in advance should we be scheduling launch webinars to maximize registration? Show me the cadence patterns from our historical data.
Which resources were downloaded most often after our product-themed webinars?
Are there content topics we have not covered yet that are trending in our industry and would complement an upcoming launch?
Show me our event list from the last 12 months so I can identify which ones were part of campaign series versus one-offs.
How does our average webinar attendance rate compare to what we would expect for a program our size?
Our average engagement score — is it above or below what is typical for B2B technology webinar programs?
What is our registrant-to-attendee conversion rate trend and how does it compare to program benchmarks?
Are our on-demand view rates healthy relative to industry expectations for content longevity?
Which of our events exceeded typical industry engagement benchmarks? I want to learn what made them successful.
How does our no-show rate compare to the platform average for programs in our category?
What poll response rates do programs like ours typically achieve, and are we on track?
Show me a trend of our average engagement score over time — I want to see if we are improving or declining relative to our own baseline.
How many events per quarter are high-performing programs in our space running, and how does our cadence compare?
What content formats — panel, solo presenter, demo — tend to outperform in engagement benchmarks, and which are we underutilizing?
Give me a full program health summary — total events, registrations, attendees, and average engagement score for this quarter.
What were our top 5 performing events this quarter and what made them stand out?
Show me a quarterly comparison of total registrations and attendees — I need this for the board deck.
How many total events did we run this year and what was our overall average attendance rate?
What is the year-over-year change in our total registrations across all programs?
I need a single-slide summary of our webinar program KPIs for the CMO — total reach, average engagement, and top event.
Which quarter this year had our strongest webinar performance overall, and what drove it?
Show me a line chart of our monthly total registrations across the full year so I can present the growth story.
What were our three biggest wins and three biggest underperformers in the webinar program this year?
Pull together a program dashboard snapshot — events run, total registrations, average attendance rate, and top company attendees — for our Q4 marketing review.
